title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
